visuals.title: Shared Memory Attachment in Process Address Space
visuals.description: Visual diagram for Shared Memory Attachment in Process Address Space
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Semaphores and Shared Memory</text>
  
  <!-- Shared Memory Block -->
  <rect x="110" y="100" width="200" height="80" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="145" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" font-weight="bold" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Shared Memory Block
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Process 1 -->
  <rect x="50" y="200" width="100" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="100" y="225" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Process 1
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Process 2 -->
  <rect x="270" y="200" width="100" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="320" y="225" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Process 2
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Arrow from Process 1 to Shared Memory -->
  <path d="M100 200 L100 150 L210 150" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" fill="none" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <!-- Arrow from Process 2 to Shared Memory -->
  <path d="M320 200 L320 150 L210 150" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" fill="none" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <!-- Semaphore -->
  <circle cx="210" y="70" r="15" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="210" y="74" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    S
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Arrow from Semaphore to Shared Memory -->
  <path d="M210 85 L210 100" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" fill="none" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <!-- Arrow from Semaphore to Process 1 -->
  <path d="M195 70 L150 200" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" fill="none" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <!-- Arrow from Semaphore to Process 2 -->
  <path d="M225 70 L270 200" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" fill="none" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <!-- Arrowhead marker definition -->
  <defs>
    <marker id="arrowhead" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="9" refY="3.5" orient="auto">
      <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="#1565C0"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>
</svg>

diagrams.title: Shared Memory Attachment in Process Address Space
